report.summary: UX audited 4 pages (2 newly built today: No-Code AI Trading Agents, Railgun Privacy DeFi + 2 from previous cycle: DeFi Lending, DeFi Yield Aggregators), created 2 new OG images (1200x630 SVG), and implemented 10 UX refinements including OG metadata fixes, breadcrumb navigation, semantic HTML, and style consistency.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: No-Code AI Trading page: Fixed OG image reference from non-existent og-no-code-ai-trading-guide.png to new og-no-code-ai-trading-agents-guide-2026.svg
No-Code AI Trading page: Added openGraph.images array with width/height for proper social card rendering
No-Code AI Trading page: Added Home link to breadcrumb for consistent navigation (was missing root link)
No-Code AI Trading page: Added aria-label='Breadcrumb' to breadcrumb nav element for accessibility
No-Code AI Trading page: Converted Table of Contents from <div> to semantic <nav> with aria-label for screen readers
Railgun Privacy page: Fixed OG image reference from non-existent og-railgun-guide.png to new og-railgun-privacy-defi-guide-2026.svg
Railgun Privacy page: Added openGraph.images array with width/height for proper social card rendering
Railgun Privacy page: Added Home link to breadcrumb navigation
Railgun Privacy page: Added aria-label='Breadcrumb' to breadcrumb nav and converted ToC to semantic <nav>
DeFi Yield Aggregators page: Fixed Related Articles heading from inline style to s.h2 constant for consistency
DeFi Yield Aggregators page: Updated timestamp from 'Updated March 2026' to 'Updated March 27, 2026' for specificity

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: no-code-ai-trading-agents-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — dark theme with Trading & AI / Beginner-Friendly badges, 3 stat cards (250K+ daily agents, 68% DeFi protocols, +27% AI accuracy), AI Agent Active visualization card

OG image: railgun-privacy-defi-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — dark theme with Privacy & DeFi badges, 4 stat cards ($108M+ TVL, $4.5B+ volume, 2x YoY growth, 4 chains), zk-SNARK verified shield card, supported chains row (Ethereum, Arbitrum, Polygon, BNB)

sections.title: UX Audit Findings (Deferred)
items: 928 of 1,207 pages (77%) still lack OG image metadata — recommend batch OG image generation script or API-based fallback
227 existing OG SVGs in public/ are not referenced by any page metadata — need inventory reconciliation
No-Code AI Trading and Railgun pages use Tailwind-first styling pattern while DeFi Lending/Yield use inline style constants pattern — two different authoring conventions coexist
FAQ styling still inconsistent across learn guides: lending uses s.h3/s.p blocks, yield uses s.faqQ/s.faqA cards, newer pages use Tailwind classes — recommend shared FAQ component
142 pre-existing TypeScript errors remain (all in other files: arbitrage, index funds, institutional adoption, lido-v3 pages have JSX escaping issues)
